page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores of the custom arm64 Alibaba YiTian710 processor, operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. The CPU configuration provides 1 thread per core, supported by 64 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 64 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core allocation. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it features a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across most standard compute and memory operations. The stress-ng single-core score is 1820.08, while the multi-core score reaches 14489.92. Memory bandwidth tests show 820.26 GB/sec for cached small-block reads, dropping to 96.36 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads and 41.19 GB/sec for large-block writes. The system exhibits a notable performance tradeoff in cryptographic operations, with a weak PassMark CPU encryption score of 1320.86, despite supporting hardware-level AES. Additionally, while small-model LLM inference is average, prompt processing for medium-sized models is poor at 10.64 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the arm64 architecture and dedicated core allocation offer a balanced resource density for compute-bound tasks without the overhead of hyperthreading. This server is configured for workloads such as static web serving, which registers a throughput of 12.71 GB/sec, and Redis database operations, achieving 13.18 million operations per second. It is also appropriate for multi-threaded decompression tasks and lightweight, CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.2xlarge is an arm64-based compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores of the Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB per core, and lacks local storage or GPU hardware. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers average performance in multi-core processing and memory bandwidth, though it exhibits weaker results in cryptographic benchmarks. With a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps, this server is designed for workloads such as static web serving, Redis key-value databases, and multi-threaded decompression tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.2xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized server with 8 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 16 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for web serving and database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.2xlarge is an arm64 server with 8 dedicated YiTian710 cores and 16 GB RAM, optimized for web serving and database tasks.
tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized server featuring dedicated physical cores and balanced memory bandwidth for web serving and database workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core allocation.
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU accelerators.
Average performance in Redis database operations and static web serving.
Reduced performance in cryptographic operations and medium-model LLM prompt processing.
